stemHtml: In a non-precision approach, descent below the published Obstacle Clearance Height (OCH) is prohibited unless the required visual references are acquired and maintained. The OCH is defined as the lowest height above (1) _____ that does not violate (2) _____.

options.a: (1) aerodrome elevation or the relevant runway threshold elevation; (2) the applicable obstacle clearance criteria.
options.b: (1) aerodrome elevation or the relevant runway threshold elevation; (2) the threshold crossing height.
options.c: (1) terrain elevation or the elevation of relevant obstacles at the current position; (2) the published approach gradient.
options.d: (1) terrain elevation or the elevation of relevant obstacles at the current position; (2) the threshold crossing height.
